aboutText: Nereo Woodworking is owned and operated by Philip Nereo. It has been in operation in beautiful Sonoma County for over a quarter of a century. We have provided many of Northern California's distinct homes and businesses with fine woodworking.
heroSubheading: Custom woodwork built with care and precision.

services.title: Custom Furniture
services.description: Tables, chairs, cabinets, and more — designed and built to your specifications.

services.title: Home Restoration
services.description: Bring new life to existing pieces with expert restoration and refinishing.

services.title: Decorative Pieces
services.description: Shelves, frames, and decorative woodwork to complement any space.
